name: greenfield
description: Greenfield kit: a PRD/TDD/ADR design-doc pipeline with phase-gate PRs. /tdd-author decides how many TDDs a PRD change needs (git-diff + coverage), recommends ADR actions, and reads BLOCKERS.md so implementation-time design blockers feed back into design. /implement builds all ready TDDs unattended in detached processes but does not trust self-reported success: the ready->implemented flip is gated on a mechanical verify (tests+typecheck) and an independent review process, with one stacked PR per TDD and downstream halt-on-failure (never merges). Includes a toolchain bootstrap skill and a format+lint hook for JS/TS, Python, Rust, and Go.
